name: Large commercial job with many line items
description: Commercial-scale roofing project with mobilization, materials, labor, disposal, and warranty. Assistant should produce all lines without truncating.

user.content: Big one — Riverside Office Park, full reroof on Building C. Mobilization $2,500. Tear-off and disposal $8,400. TPO membrane material $22,000. Insulation board $6,800. Labor $18,500. Flashing & edge metal $3,200. Crane day $1,800. 20-year manufacturer warranty registration $750.

payload.summary: Reroof — Riverside Office Park, Bldg C
